ValidationRule.description: When Accounting is enabled Interest/MR/SD Accounting Method is mandatory
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: false /*AND( !$Setup.LeaseWorksSettings__c.Disable_All_Triggers__c,Accounting_Setup_P__c !=null , OR( TEXT(Interest_Accounting_Method__c) == null, TEXT(MR_Accounting_Method__c) == null, TEXT(SD_Accounting_Method__c) == null))*/
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Interest, MR and SD Accounting Methods are required to proceed.
